Suggested Question: Why XIVAppApiClient connects Plugin Windows to API Client
Query: Why XIVAppApiClient connects Plugin Windows to Plugin API Client
Rationale: XIVAppApiClient is UI-to-HTTP bridge, service-locator the UI cannot function without
Architectural Warning: Split XIVAppApiClient into XIVAppPatronApi/XIVAppShiftApi/XIVAppVenueApi at 7th consumer or 13th method
MainWindow (uses GetActiveEventAsync to gate sync UI)
